creator: 000.fbsd@quip.cz
text:
(In reply to wolfgang from comment #0)
This option was removed 1 year ago in this commit:
https://github.com/FreeBSD/freebsd-ports/commit/b8e72f7c31046aee0be12553dd1fffde7706ffde

The point is - all ports dependent on ImageMagick should use USES=magick which takes care of what version of ImageMagick will be used as a build / run dependency.
If you will set ImageMagick to nox11 flavor, pecl-imagick will be built with this dependency.

With the following options in the make.conf
DEFAULT_VERSIONS= php=8.1 IMAGEMAGICK=7-nox11

The resulting packages are:
ImageMagick7-nox11-7.1.1.26_4
php81-pecl-imagick-3.7.0_4
